pr.title: Record: PROTEUS v1.6 — Scylla + Parallel Residuals + Depth Recurrence + Legal TTT — val_bpb 1.0819 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Integrates Scylla retokenization with parallel residuals/depth recurrence, legal TTT, sensitivity-driven mixed INT5/INT6 quantization, and learnable lane mixing.
techniques: Mixed INT5/INT6 per-layer quantization with sensitivity-aware routing
Learnable lane_merge and resid_mix_mlp atop parallel residual streams
Scylla retokenization pipeline tied to depth recurrence and legal TTT
